payload.description:
## Summary
Expose the new misclassification-analysis payload through evaluation info surfaces and API consumers.

## Deliverables
- Include the structured payload in evaluation info responses used by MCP and dashboard consumers.
- Keep the payload first-class rather than burying it inside free-form text.
- Preserve a clear separation between item classifications, evaluation-level flags, and optimization RCA.
payload.title: Expose misclassification-analysis payloads through evaluation info surfaces
